(We did not set out to build two platforms. We set out to solve one problem: the chronic failure of industrial asset) Tj
T* (programs to connect mechanical integrity with surface preservation � two disciplines that operate on the same) Tj
T* (equipment, in the same facilities, under the same regulatory scrutiny, yet have always been managed in separate) Tj
T* (systems, by separate teams, with separate data.) Tj

/F1 9 Tf
10.3499999999999996 TL
0.235 0.255 0.294 rg
62.3622047244094517 629.291574803149615 Td
(D-IMS was built to solve the integrity side. FabricTrack was built to solve the preservation side. When we built both, we) Tj
T* (realized what no vendor in this industry has produced before: a fully integrated ecosystem where a coating failure) Tj
T* (detected in FabricTrack automatically enriches the CUI risk score in D-IMS. Where an RBI inspection interval in D-IMS) Tj
T* (automatically prioritizes the workpack queue in FabricTrack. Where a single asset record, a single work history, and a) Tj
T* (single compliance audit trail span both platforms � without duplication, without gaps, without the manual reconciliation) Tj
T* (that costs operators thousands of hours per year.) Tj
